view.title: Inspect Experiment Chamber {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to retransmit the laboratory orientation communication?
view.emailSentMessage: The laboratory orientation communication has been retransmitted. Check your message receptacle.

reverseDns.title: Reverse Portal Routing Configuration
reverseDns.changeWarning: Modifications to reverse portal routing require up to one hour to propagate through the network.

ipmiLive.title: IPMI Network Node Address
ipmiLive.description: Assigns a live network node address to the IPMI controller apparatus, restricted to your network node address and limited to 24 hours of operation.

order.title: Requisition Experiment Chamber
order.hostnameHelp: Use the system designation to identify the experiment chamber. The portal designation does not need to be valid or registered. One period is required in the system designation. Other examples: database.local, web.chamber or your.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Protocol Note: Security Access Passphrase must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase character, one uppercase character, one numerical digit, and a special character.
order.contactSales: Please contact our laboratory sales division.
order.agreeToTerms: Agree to the research covenant terms
order.autoRenewNotice: The research subscription will automatically renew after every lunar month at {cost} until experiment termination.
order.tosAcknowledgement: By activating this parameter, you acknowledge that you are acquiring a subscription laboratory apparatus that automatically renews (As Per The Research Covenant Outlined Above) and is billed to the Monetary Transfer Device you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the researcher portal, select the active apparatus and activate the Abort link, or transmit correspondence to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Research Covenant and Privacy Protocol. By activating the parameter and placing your requisition below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Research Covenant and Privacy Protocol.
order.iAgreeToTerms: I have studied the research covenant above and I agree.
